Both educational entertaining, this graphic novel helps restore pride Iran's ancient prominent world heritage.

Australia-based software provider PageUp recently shared another update data breach disclosed earlier this year.
company says found evidence that attackers have actually stolen data from systems.
security incident identified after firm detected suspicious activity infrastructure.
Roughly weeks later, notified customers that contact information, usernames, password hashes other data have been taken.
Specifically, attacker have gained access information belonging current former employees PageUp clients, PageUp client applicants, agencies.
PageUp says million active users across over countries, incident resulted some company's customers shutting down their online recruitment pages.
PageUp informed customers last week that investigation been completed there evidence that data actually stolen.
detailed forensic investigation PageUp security incident this year concluded that while attacker successful installing tools that could exfiltrate data, specific evidence found that data exfiltrated," company said.
PageUp notified data regulators both Australia shortly after discovering breach.
statement issued Australian authorities following public disclosure noted that risk identity theft low, warned that compromised information could more useful phishing emails phone scams.
weeks after PageUp disclosed breach customers, Florida-based services provider ComplyRight revealed that reporting platform involved cybersecurity incident that resulted exposure personal information.

20mph Road Plenty, Enough?
Home Driving instructor training Twenty Plenty, Enough?
Where stand debate reduce speed limit from 30mph 20mph?
think it's thing enforce lower speed limit, feel that benefits doing will outweigh drop speed slower journey?
Those favour speed reduction cite compelling reasons doing
first, perhaps most important, that slower traffic means increased road safety.
Slower speeds mean more time plan ahead react while driving, event accident, lower speed less likely that serious injury will result from
Also, studies show that overall vehicle travelling 20mph less harmful effect environment than were travelling 30mph.
less aggressive road would also encourage more cyclists, with associated health benefits that come from travelling under your steam.
There also those need such measure feel that it's just another interference nanny state.
Perhaps another way, ain't broke, don't it'.
Opposers also feel that this reduction speed would slow pace road down much point where becomes long, drawn-out affair anywhere.
They also make point that argument made somewhat irrelevant fact that speeding laws most universally broken laws anyway.
What's point changing unless it's backed traditional monitoring methods, such police speed traps fixed/mobile GATSO speed cameras; can't have them everywhere.
'twenty plentier', feel that things fine just they are?
Whichever side you're it's debate that will draw strong emotions all.
